title: School Workforce Census
subtitle: Assemble the 2026 return from your workforce data and export the DfE XML.
empty: No workforce members on the census date.

readiness.heading: Readiness
readiness.intro: These need fixing before the return is complete:
readiness.clear: No readiness issues — every member has the required data.
readiness.note: The return omits the Curriculum and Qualification modules and the School vacancies module (all need subjects-taught, which isn't modelled yet). Pay-range codes are mapped to the DfE set (verify against CBDS). Validate the XML against the official DfE schema before submitting.
